---
title: "Roadmap"
---

The current product direction lives in tracked Markdown files so the source of truth stays easy to review in GitHub.

## Local Referee

The first production target is a polished local referee that can run a full game without physical cards.

<a class="btn btn-primary" href="https://github.com/ashitaka-emishi/the-establishment/blob/master/docs/LOCAL_REFEREE_ROADMAP.md">Read the local referee roadmap</a>

<a class="btn btn-secondary" href="https://github.com/ashitaka-emishi/the-establishment/blob/master/docs/FULL_GAME_PLAYTEST_CHECKLIST.md">Open the playtest checklist</a>

## Future Multiplayer

Online multiplayer and Discord Activity support are later-phase work after rule fidelity, card data, scoring, and table UX stabilize.

<a class="btn btn-secondary" href="https://github.com/ashitaka-emishi/the-establishment/blob/master/docs/MULTIPLAYER_DISCORD_SPIKE.md">Read the multiplayer spike</a>
<a class="btn btn-secondary" href="https://github.com/ashitaka-emishi/the-establishment/blob/master/docs/MULTIPLAYER_PLAN.md">Read the multiplayer plan</a>

## Milestone Sequence

1. Product definition and backlog.
2. Local referee beta.
3. Rulebook fidelity and assets.
4. Mobile and table UX polish.
5. Multiplayer and Discord spike.
